name: executor-module-placement
question: Where should BunSqlExecutor live in the codebase?
decision: New directory packages/state-api/src/query/execution/ with types.ts (ISqlExecutor interface), bun-sql.ts (BunSqlExecutor), utils.ts (tagged template conversion, field normalization), index.ts (barrel)
rationale: Maintains separation: backends/ contains IBackend implementations (compile or in-memory execute), execution/ contains ISqlExecutor implementations (actual database execution). Follows existing query/ subdirectory pattern (ast/, backends/, validation/).
